+++
title = 'Scouting for Food – Get Involved!'
date = '2013-10-28T08:54:59-0400'
url = '/2013/10/scouting-for-food-get-involved/'
categories = ['Announcements']
+++
<p><img decoding="async" class="alignleft" style="margin: 2px 6px; border: 0px;" alt="" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="180" height="180">Every November Troop 55 participates in BSA&#8217;s <em>Scouting for Food </em>drive. &nbsp;This is a great way for scouts and their families to give back to the community and help those in need.</p>
<p>Every scout should sign-up for a time slot to help with this endeavor. &nbsp;And we need parents too! &nbsp;If you are a parent that can help coordinate or drive, please sign up.</p>
<p><strong>Bag Drop-Off: &nbsp;Saturday, 11/2</strong><br />
<strong>Food Pick-Up: &nbsp;Saturday, 11/9</strong></p>
<p>Questions? &nbsp;Email <a href="javascript:DeCryptX('0j3x2n1j2c203w2j1p2t3v1f1o1A0g2o1b1j1m0.1d3r2o')">Julie Thorsen</a></p>
<p>Sign Up Now:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.signupgenius.com/go/904084AABAF22A64-scouting">http://www.signupgenius.com/go/904084AABAF22A64-scouting</a></li>
</ul>
<p>We still need lots of help.</p>
